rows.label: qev014001_MSG0001
rows.name: [ST:playername ]! I'm so glad you came![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0002
rows.name:
I was wondering what to do
if you didn't show up...!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0003
rows.name:
Eliza-san is about to give
a grand speech here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0004
rows.name:
The topic is "Coexistence with Aliens:
Considering the Future of NLA"!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_JNK0010
rows.name: Downplay

rows.label: qev014001_SEL0011
rows.name: Reply with a lack of interest.

rows.label: qev014001_JNK0020
rows.name: Admire

rows.label: qev014001_SEL0021
rows.name: Genuinely express admiration.

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0005
rows.name: Come on, act a little more surprised!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0006
rows.name:
This is an opportunity for
our activities to be heard
directly by a lot of people!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0007
rows.name: Right, right!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0008
rows.name:
It was my proposal! She even praised
me, saying it was a good idea![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0009
rows.name:
But honestly, I think things might get
dangerous during Eliza-san's speech![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0010
rows.name:
Our movement has a lot
of momentum right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0011
rows.name:
It wouldn't be surprising if Alex
and his group plot to assassinate
Eliza-san out of revenge!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_JNK0110
rows.name: Confirm role

rows.label: qev014001_SEL0111
rows.name: Say it sounds like a job for a sniper.

rows.label: qev014001_JNK0120
rows.name: Tease

rows.label: qev014001_SEL0121
rows.name: Jokingly ask if you should pull her away from enthusiastic listeners.

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0012
rows.name:
Exactly! Wait, you can't be
the one shooting Eliza-san!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0013
rows.name:
I want you to keep a close eye out to make
sure there are no enemies like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0014
rows.name:
Exactly! So hot and young
listeners don't charge at
Eliza-san during the speech...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0015
rows.name:
Wait, no! I mean if an enemy happens to
appear, I want you to knock them out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0016
rows.name:
So, here is my request once
again! Guard Eliza-san while
she gives her speech! Please![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0017
rows.name: Thank you! Now I can rest easy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0018
rows.name:
Phew, honestly... Alice
worries far too much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0019
rows.name:
This is NLA, a city protected by BLADE,
you know? No matter the criminal, they
wouldn't dare act recklessly here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0020
rows.name:
More importantly, whether our views will
be properly conveyed to the people of the
city... that is what concerns me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0021
rows.name:
It will be fine! Deep down,
everyone wants to get along
better with the aliens too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0022
rows.name:
If they listen to Eliza-san's passionate
speech, even the people who were hesitating
to join hands will surely take a step forward![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0023
rows.name: ...Right, don't you think so? [ST:playername ]-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_JNK0210
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev014001_SEL0211
rows.name: Nod at Alice's words, agreeing completely.

rows.label: qev014001_JNK0220
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev014001_SEL0221
rows.name: Advise Alice that it won't be that simple.

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0024
rows.name:
Right, right! We went through
terrible things on Earth, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0025
rows.name:
Everyone should have the heart of
understanding and tolerance to
overcome that and forge bonds![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0026
rows.name:
So mean! Sure, there are people
like Alex around, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0027
rows.name:
Everyone else is different! They definitely
possess the heart of understanding and
tolerance that HQ talks about![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Thank you, Alice.
And you as well, [ST:playername ]-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0029
rows.name:
In order to not waste the efforts of
everyone who has supported us thus far,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0030
rows.name:
I will absolutely make
this speech a succe[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0031
rows.name: Eliza-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0032
rows.name:
Is this[ST:wide ]— She's been shot!? How
could this... Eliza-san...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0034
rows.name: Ah... Ugh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0035
rows.name:
Thank goodness... She's
still breathing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0036
rows.name:
...Hey! I'll take Eliza-san
to the Maintenance Center![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0037
rows.name: You go in the direction of the sniper[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0038
rows.name:
Head to the BLADE Area
and find the culprit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0039
rows.name:
We absolutely cannot let someone who
did something this cruel roam free![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0040
rows.name:
Please! Don't miss a single trivial
detail, and find the culprit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0041
rows.name:
Eliza-san is in the Maintenance
Center undergoing surgery...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0042
rows.name:
She lost a lot of bio-circulation
fluid, so... It seems she is in
an unpredictable condition.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0043
rows.name:
...Please. If it's the BLADEs in
the BLADE Area, someone surely
must have witnessed the sniper.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0044
rows.name:
Don't miss any information, and
find that hateful culprit for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0045
rows.name:
How is it? Did you grasp any
information on the sniper?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0046
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Eh!? A guy carrying a rifle
case boarded a Doll and headed
for Shiraki no Tairiku...!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0047
rows.name:
That's incredibly suspicious!
Make sure you catch them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0048
rows.name:
The crime of hurting Eliza-san... We
definitely have to make them pay for it...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0049
rows.name: How was it!? Did you find the sniper?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0050
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Eh!? They suddenly attacked,
so you took them out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0051
rows.name:
I see. Thank you... Now we can
feel relieved on that front.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0052
rows.name:
Eliza-san is... hospitalized
for a while...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0053
rows.name:
Her life isn't in danger, but they want
to observe her for a bit to check for
any effects from the parts exchange.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_JNK0310
rows.name: Apologize

rows.label: qev014001_SEL0311
rows.name: Apologize for failing to fully guard her despite accepting the request.

rows.label: qev014001_JNK0320
rows.name: Grieve

rows.label: qev014001_SEL0321
rows.name: State that without the leader, activities will likely be paused for a while.

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0054
rows.name:
They sniped her out of nowhere... There's
no way we could have dealt with it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0055
rows.name:
Taking down the culprit is a massive
achievement on its own! Truly, thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0056
rows.name:
I'll also do my best so I don't lose
to you until Eliza-san returns![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0057
rows.name:
But, but! Yielding to those guys now
would be playing right into their hands![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0058
rows.name:
We have to continue our activities
until Eliza-san recovers![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0059
rows.name:
It will be tough, but I have
to take the center stage![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0060
rows.name:
You know, I think Alex is the one pulling
the strings behind this incident...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0061
rows.name:
We will definitely corner him! And then,
we'll make this city peaceful properly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0062
rows.name:
Oh right, I received your reward from
Eliza-san beforehand. Here, take it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0063
rows.name:
I think the day will definitely
come when we'll need to ask for
your cooperation again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014001_MSG0064
rows.name:
When that time comes,
I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]
